case_title: SF UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT,UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT vs. GARRETT, EDWARD THOMAS et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SF UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT,UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT AS TO DEFENDANT GARRETT, EDWARD THOMAS DOES 1 THROUGH 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-28-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-31-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-08-1994
